## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps for SEO and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 150 articles published and 22 more in the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Organic traffic has increased significantly, with 4x growth in clicks since July](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Top-performing articles are generating high impressions, but need to balance with ICP-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Team to focus on creating lead magnets and email nurturing campaigns to convert traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Categorization

  - [150 articles published, 22 more in pipeline (172 total)](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Content categorized into topic clusters (e.g., event planning, marketing, management)](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [80% of topics target ICP, 20% for broader domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Team considering adding subcategories for more detailed organization](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Currently no formal review process due to volume](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Agreed to focus on reviewing top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Rebecca to review 10-20 top articles by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [November (18 days): 2,600 clicks, projecting 4,000 for full month](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [4x growth in clicks since July (945 to \~4,000)](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Total impressions increased from 25k to 200k](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [GrowthX content contributing 971 of 1,170 weekly clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)

### SEO and Keyword Rankings

  - [Organic traffic increased from 7,300 to 10,900 at website level](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Blog traffic grew from 447 to 4,800 monthly organic visits](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Keywords in top 3 positions increased from 9 to 63](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [500 keywords now ranking in positions 4-10](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

### Lead Generation Strategy

  - [Team to create lead magnets for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Implement email automation campaigns to nurture leads](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Focus on converting high-volume traffic into qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Balancing high-volume topics with ICP-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Team to propose keywords targeting event management and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Exploring content ideas directly related to Swoogo's offerings (e.g., customized registration)](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rebecca to review top 10-20 performing articles by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Prateek to include "How many cups of coffee in a gallon" as a creative content piece](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Mitch to update HubSpot MQL dashboard, disqualifying irrelevant leads](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Team to create a list of ICP-focused keywords for future content](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Develop lead magnets for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Begin implementing email nurturing sequences](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Explore content ideas more directly related to Swoogo's product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Mszd8pyLU89qzmZ41zQjsfYZLy67TpYs?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
